name: product-rec-mvp
title: MVP: Product Recommendation via Guided Chatbot
description: Thin production stack MVP: Next.js + FastAPI + Qdrant + LangGraph. Elimination-first discovery loop with hybrid persona model.
creator: Yushi Cui

subtasks.name: PR1: Scaffolding — Next.js + FastAPI + Qdrant + PostgreSQL
PR2: Product catalog — dummy products + CLIP embeddings + Qdrant ingestion
PR3: LangGraph agent — 6-node graph + persona extraction + embedding + retrieval
PR4: API layer — SSE streaming + chat + recommend + feedback endpoints
PR5: Frontend — split-pane discovery UI + streaming chat + recommendation grid
PR6: Integration + polish — end-to-end wiring + session resume + error handling

notes: Brainstorm completed 2026-04-13. Decisions: thin production stack, hybrid persona (JSON + embedding), modular 6-node LangGraph, multimodal CLIP embeddings.
